Description: Lounging upon this luxurious sofa, you shall want only for a cup of sweet Corvosi tea.
Name: Corvosi Sofa

Description: This vibrant purple carpet is sure to make a captivating centerpiece in any room.
Name: Purple Corvosi Carpet

Description: This soothing green carpet is sure to make a captivating centerpiece in any room.
Name: Green Corvosi Carpet

Description: An austere screen designed to complement Corvosi residences. Affords a certain sense of ennui.
Name: Corvosi Screen

Description: Regrettably, this nonfunctional replica cannot produce strange and colorful smoke of any kind.
Name: Imitation Corvosi Shisha

Description: This feathered fan is known to signify status among Corvosi nobles.
Name: Corvosi Fan

Description: A crystal so royally purple, no sumptuous mansion of untold riches would truly be complete without one. Preferably two.
Name: Corvosi Crystal

Description: A mysterious shard of Corvosi origin. Perhaps someone can piece together the story it tells...
Name: Corvosi Potsherd

Description: Rubbing this lamp will release the genie that dwells within. Not the actual being of legend so cannot grant wishes─unless your wish is to be carried somewhere.
Name: Genie Lamp

Description: A thin key that brings the monstrous battlebike, the Hardy-Daytona, roaring to life.
Name: Hardy-Daytona Key

Description: With but a few magic words, this carpet will bear you forth and show you the world shining, shimmering, splendid.
Name: Royal Magicked Carpet
